case_title: OPORTUN INC. VS. ROGELIO JIMENEZ GARCIA

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$55.00) SERVED APR-01-2017, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT GARCIA, ROGELIO JIMENEZ

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAY-10-2017 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAY-10-2017 BY JUDGE PRO TEM ELIZABETH ZAREH. PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC. PRESENT. REPRESENTED BY DONNA FLORES ALBERTO, LEGAL COLLECTION SPECIALIST. NO APPEARANCE BY THE DEFENDANT ROGELIO JIMENEZ GARCIA. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: ELIZABETH ZAREH; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC. (FORMERLY PROGRESS FINANCIAL CORP.) RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GARCIA, ROGELIO JIMENEZ $2,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $105.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,605.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-10-2017 - JUDGMENT.
